title: Non-surgical facial aesthetic treatments now at CSN Centre
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The CSN Medical Centre,...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - The CSN Medical Centre, close to the Life Bay View hospital in Da Nova, Mossel Bay, is expanding to meet the growing demand for non-surgical facial aesthetic treatments.


> Christo Strydom, founder of CSN, known for drastic weight-loss and diabetes remission, has announced the expansion of the CSN Medical Centre in Mossel Bay in response to the increasing demand from clients who have successfully completed their weight loss and health journeys.


Many of these clients have expressed an interest in non-surgical facial aesthetic treatments, such as Botox and dermal fillers.

To accommodate this need, a dedicated consultation room has been established at the Mossel Bay CSN Medical Centre, conveniently located opposite the Life Bay View hospital. The centre aims to provide these treatments in a professional setting at affordable prices.

To uphold the highest standards of care, CSN has partnered with Dr Inus Strydom, a highly respected expert in the field with 17 years of experience. Originally from East London, Dr Strydom brings a wealth of knowledge and expertise to the centre, ensuring that patients receive top-quality treatment and personalised care.

With this expansion, CSN is broadening its focus beyond obesity, diabetes and related health conditions to include advanced aesthetic and rejuvenation treatments. This move reinforces CSN's commitment to holistic well-being, combining its expertise with innovative aesthetic solutions. The organisation is proud to introduce these new services and looks forward to expanding them nationwide.


> For bookings or enquiries:


- Call 072 435 7292.

Or reach out on social media:

- Facebook
- Instagram
- Twitter
- Pinterest


> Watch: Professor Mollentze discusses his breakthrough study on Diabetes Remision


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
